title: Thlipui leh ruah sur nasa avanga chhiat tawkte hnenah Chief Minister-in zangnadawmna a hlan
content:
351/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, 1st May 2026 :Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan a bial, Thenzawl khawchhunga thlipui leh ruahpui avanga chhiat tawkte hnenah SDRF leh CM Relief Fund atangin zangnadawmna a hlan a, Thenzawl Kanan veng leh Tualvungi veng a chhiat tawkte chu a hmunah a tlawh nghal bawk.

April ni 27, thawhtanni tlaia thlipui leh ruahpui sur khan Thenzawl-a chenna in 8 chu luah tlak lohvin a len chhia a, heng bakah hian in chhe nasa zual 9 awmin, chhe nasa lutuk lo 54, sawrkar in leh vantlang in chhia 13 leh electrict ban tlu 15 a awm a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram State Election Commision hriattirna
content:
350/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 01st May, 2026 :Mizoram State Election Commision chuan April 30, 2026 khan notification tichhuakin Mara Autonomous District Council hnuaia VC by-election ah a hnuaia tarlan te hi thlan tlin an ni tih a puang.
